{# Vendor detail partial — full vendor card with contacts, stats, and recent sightings. Loaded via HTMX into #main-content. #}

{{ vendor.display_name }}

{% if vendor.domain %}{{ vendor.domain }}{% endif %} {% if vendor.hq_city %}{{ vendor.hq_city }}{% if vendor.hq_country %}, {{ vendor.hq_country }}{% endif %}{% endif %} {% if vendor.industry %}{{ vendor.industry }}{% endif %}

{% endif %}

{{ "%.0f%%"|format(vendor.overall_win_rate * 100) if vendor.overall_win_rate else "—" }}

Total POs

{{ vendor.total_pos or 0 }}

Response Time

{{ "%.0fh"|format(vendor.avg_response_hours) if vendor.avg_response_hours else "—" }}

Contacts ({{ contacts|length }})

Name Title Email Phone

{% endif %} {# Recent sightings #} {% if recent_sightings %}

Recent Sightings

{% for s in recent_sightings %} {% endfor %}
MPN Qty Price Source Date
{{ s.mpn_matched or "—" }} {{ "{:,}".format(s.qty_available) if s.qty_available else "—" }} {{ "$%.4f"|format(s.unit_price) if s.unit_price else "—" }} {{ s.source_type or "—" }} {{ s.created_at.strftime('%b %d') if s.created_at else "—" }}
{% endif %}
